Personal meals during business trips are taxable BIK and subject to gross-up as per the compliancePoliciesGrossUpRelated.
The name of clients/vendor in the expense report for business meal with clients/vendor must be provided as per the compliancePoliciesAdditionalInfoRelated.
The business purpose must be established clearly for the expense as per the compliancePoliciesAdditionalInfoRelated.
The amount must be converted to local currency and include currency & exchange rate used for foreign currency expenses as per the compliancePoliciesAdditionalInfoRelated.
